nasb.text: Therefore I will give thanks to You among the nations, O Lord, And I will sing praises to Your name.

esv.text: For this I will praise you, O Lord, among the nations, and sing to your name.

cnv.text: 因此，耶和華啊！我要在列國中稱讚你，歌頌你的名。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华啊， 我要在列邦中赞美你， 歌颂你的名。

csbs.text: 因此我要在列国中称谢你， 耶和华啊，我要歌颂你的名！
